title: Verify existing implementation of role hierarchy checker
description: The role-hierarchy.ts and role-hierarchy.test.ts files already exist with a complete implementation of hasPermission(userRole, requiredRole) using hierarchy admin > editor > viewer > guest. All 19 tests pass.
existing_patterns: src/auth/role-hierarchy.ts uses a Record<string, number> map for hierarchy levels with numeric comparison
src/auth/role-hierarchy.test.ts follows the utility module testing pattern with describe/it blocks
